description: A photograph showing a narrow, grassy embankment or causeway separating two calm bodies of water, likely ponds. The embankment is covered in green grass and appears to be a path. In the background, a dense line of trees forms a forest. A small, light-coloured vehicle is faintly visible near the treeline on the left side. Reflections of the sky and trees are visible on the water surfaces. Some reeds or tall aquatic grasses grow along the edges of the water. The bottom left corner shows a copyright notice: "© Zemešval, USCAD, 2009". The image illustrates a type of artificial pond structure, consistent with descriptions for "8.2.2 Reservoirs" or "8.2.3 Aquaculture ponds" in the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) nomenclature.
